title: Extraction of Low-Molecular-Weight Compounds from Mouse Serum and Brain Tissue
author: Carl Olson

steps.title: Mix acetonitrile and methanol (LC–MS grade) 1:1 (v/v)
steps.instruction: Mix acetonitrile and methanol (LC–MS grade) 1:1 (v/v) . Add formic acid (LC–MS grade) to 0.1% (v/v) . This is the base extraction solvent.

steps.title: (OPTIONAL) Prepare the internal standard (IS)...
steps.instruction: (OPTIONAL) Prepare the internal standard (IS) extraction solvent: prepare a second batch of base extraction solvent and supplement with IS, each at a final concentration of at least 200 nM .

steps.title: Aliquot both solvents into labelled tubes
steps.instruction: Aliquot both solvents into labelled tubes. Pre-chill to −20 °C and store overnight until use.

steps.title: Administer a terminal overdose by intramuscular...
steps.instruction: Administer a terminal overdose by intramuscular injection of ketamine/xylazine at 120 mg/kg and 20 mg/kg , respectively. Confirm full loss of consciousness and absence of pedal withdrawal reflex before proceeding.

steps.title: Aspirate 0
steps.instruction: Aspirate 0.5–1.0 mL whole blood from the left ventricle of the anesthetized animal using a 20 GA needle and syringe.

steps.title: Transfer blood immediately to labelled uncoated tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer blood immediately to labelled uncoated tubes. Allow to coagulate at room temperature (approximately 25 °C ) for 10–15 minutes .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 2,000 × g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 2,000 × g for 10 minutes at 4 °C .

steps.title: Carefully transfer the serum (upper layer)...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the serum (upper layer) to a fresh labelled tube without disturbing the cell pellet. Proceed immediately to serum extraction or place on ice.

steps.title: Following blood aspiration, perfuse the animal...
steps.instruction: Following blood aspiration, perfuse the animal transcardially with 20 mL of ice-cold PBS containing heparin at 20 IU/mL .

steps.title: Explant the brain
steps.instruction: Explant the brain. Weigh immediately on an analytical balance and record the wet weight. Expected weight: approximately 230 mg (mean ± SEM: 230 ± 6 mg).

steps.title: Transfer the brain to a pre-chilled microcentrifuge tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the brain to a pre-chilled microcentrifuge tube. Add the pre-chilled extraction solvent at a ratio of 3 µL solvent per 1 mg wet tissue . Example: 230 mg brain → 690 µL extraction solvent

steps.title: Homogenize the brain on ice using...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the brain on ice using the Sonoplus UW 2070 probe sonicator (Bandelin Electronic) or similar. Use short bursts to ensure thorough homogenization while keeping the sample cold throughout.

steps.title: For serum
steps.instruction: For serum: transfer 300 µL aliquots of serum to pre-chilled microcentrifuge tubes. Add 3 volumes ( 900 µL ) of pre-chilled IS extraction solvent if using IS; otherwise add standard extraction solvent. Vortex briefly.

steps.title: For brain homogenate
steps.instruction: For brain homogenate: the extraction solvent was added and homogenization performed earlier. No additional solvent addition is required.

steps.title: Incubate all samples at −20 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate all samples at −20 °C for 20 minutes to ensure complete protein precipitation.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16,000 × g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000 × g for 10 minutes at 4 °C .

steps.title: Carefully transfer the clarified supernatant to...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the clarified supernatant to a fresh tube without disturbing the protein pellet.

steps.title: Transfer the clarified supernatant to a 0
steps.instruction: Transfer the clarified supernatant to a 0.22 µm microcentrifuge filter tube (#CLS8160; Sigma-Aldrich).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16,000 × g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000 × g for 15 minutes at 4 °C . Transfer the filtered filtrate to a fresh tube.

steps.title: Transfer the filtered liquid to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the filtered liquid to a 30 kDa MWCO microcentrifuge filter tube (#MRCF0R030; MilliporeSigma).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16,000 × g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000 × g for 15 minutes at 4 °C . Collect the filtrate (flow-through).

steps.title: Transfer all filtered extracts to fresh, labelled microcentrifuge tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer all filtered extracts to fresh, labelled microcentrifuge tubes. Store at −80 °C until LC–MS/MS analysis.

steps.title: Process the two designated calibration animals...
steps.instruction: Process the two designated calibration animals using plain extraction solvent (no IS) through Parts 3–5.

steps.title: Pool the serum extract from both animals
steps.instruction: Pool the serum extract from both animals. Separately pool the brain extracts from both animals.

steps.title: Prepare calibration points by spiking pooled...
steps.instruction: Prepare calibration points by spiking pooled matrix with target compounds separately, spanning a concentration range of 1–1000 nM. Additionally spike IS at a fixed concentration of 100 nM across all calibration points.
